bead.title: bench: docs and shell cleanup
bead.description:
Final cleanup pass after the lane scaffolding is gone. Update operator-facing docs, retire obsolete shell wrappers, and amend the remaining specs that still reference deleted vocabulary.

Files to update:
- scripts/benchmark/README.md: rewrite operator workflow section. Remove references to fiz-bench sweep, lane authoring, lane clone, recipes. Document ./benchmark CLI.
- scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh: delete or rewrite as a one-line wrapper around ./benchmark. Drop the alias case arms, phase logic, Python YAML-scraping snippets.
- scripts/benchmark/run_medium_model_terminalbench_comparison.sh: same treatment.
- docs/benchmarks/sections/02-terminal-bench.md, 03-profiles-intro.md, 05-detailed-metrics-intro.md: scan for stale lane/recipe vocabulary; reword in terms of profile/bench-set.
- docs/benchmarks/runtime-props.md: scan for stale references.
- docs/helix/01-frame/prd.md: scan for benchmark sections referencing lanes/recipes.
- docs/helix/01-frame/features/FEAT-008-benchmark-workbench.md: scan; amend with cell-embed note if relevant.
- docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-009-benchmark-mode.md: amend with ADR-016 pointer (banner at top).
- docs/helix/02-design/solution-designs/SD-014-benchmark-site-information-architecture.md: amend with ADR-016 pointer if it discusses lane joins.
- docs/helix/02-design/benchmark-baseline-tb2-qwen-2026-05-01.md: scan for stale references.

(SD-010, SD-012, SD-015 already have 2026-05-16 banners pointing to ADR-016.)

In-scope files: above list (~10-12 docs)

Out-of-scope:
- Deleting source code (PR 4)

Spec: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification.md section 'PR 5'
bead.acceptance:
1. 'rg -i "lane|recipe|comparison.group|resource.group|lane.alias|profile.inventory" docs/benchmarks/ scripts/benchmark/README.md' returns only intentional historical references (e.g. quoting ADR-016 explaining what was removed). Manual review confirms zero unintended hits.
2. 'bash -n scripts/benchmark/run_terminalbench_2_1_sweep.sh' passes shellcheck syntax.
3. The benchmark README's first code block is './benchmark --profile P --bench-set B', not a fiz-bench invocation.
4. 'rg "fiz-bench (sweep|matrix|lanes)" docs/ scripts/benchmark/' returns zero hits except inside historical-note prose.
